overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit city at night. The character traverses a crosswalk, covered sidewalks, a dark corridor, an open plaza with distinctive red architecture, and finally approaches a futuristic gas station while pedestrians and futuristic vehicles populate the environment.

agents.ego_description: walking across a wet crosswalk with a group of pedestrians in a futuristic city intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red coat walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
high-rise building with illuminated windows and neon accents
painted white crossing lines on wet reflective asphalt
rain-slicked road surface reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a neon-lit intersection at night, crossing a wet asphalt road with white crosswalk markings. A large vertical billboard dominates the center background while a neon office tower rises on the right. The character moves with a moderate crowd of pedestrians across the reflective pavement.

events.description: steps onto sidewalk from crosswalk, entering covered walkway area

agents.ego_description: proceeding along a sidewalk lined with neon storefronts and covered walkways

entered.detail: overhead walkway structure with prominent cyan neon lighting
commercial building facade with bright cyan neon strips
trees lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open intersection onto a concrete sidewalk lined with a covered walkway featuring prominent cyan neon lighting on the left. The large vertical billboard shifts to the left as the character moves forward, while street trees appear on the right. The wet asphalt gives way to dry concrete pavement.

events.description: enters darker covered corridor beneath overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit corridor beneath concrete overpasses

entered.detail: dark concrete structure forming the wall of the covered passage
red illuminated signage glowing at the end of the corridor
small kiosk structure with white and red color scheme

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed pedestrian corridor beneath a concrete overpass. The lighting shifts to low light with a prominent red neon glow visible ahead. A white and red vending booth stands in the center of the path as the character moves through the sheltered concrete passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with red structural beams

events.description: exits corridor into open plaza with distinctive red architecture

agents.ego_description: navigating through an open plaza passing under large red structural arches

entered.detail: large red metal support beams forming architectural features in the plaza
purple neon sign with 'TENGU' lettering on distant building
large planter containing a tree in the middle of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark corridor, the character enters a wide-open plaza with distinctive red structural arches dominating the foreground. The ground changes to paved tiles with a large planter and tree in the center. A purple 'TENGU' neon sign is visible in the distance as the character navigates around the red architectural elements.

events.description: approaches TURBO gas station with futuristic parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking toward and past a futuristic gas station with neon green and yellow signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow pants walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: futuristic gas station with green and yellow neon canopy and signage
sleek black futuristic vehicle parked near the station
palm trees lining the right side of the approach
storefront with bright pink neon lighting on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a futuristic 'TURBO' gas station with a distinctive green and yellow neon canopy. Futuristic vehicles are parked near the station while palm trees line the right side of the path. The ground returns to asphalt as the character passes the gas station and continues through the neon-lit downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban center that transitions from a crowded neon intersection into a wide, futuristic plaza. It begins with the character crossing a wet asphalt road beneath a towering vertical billboard and a glowing office tower, moving alongside a crowd of pedestrians. As the character steps off the reflective pavement, the scene shifts onto a dry concrete sidewalk lined with cyan neon walkways and street trees. The camera then follows the character into a dim, enclosed pedestrian corridor beneath a concrete overpass, passing a red and white vending booth before emerging into a bright, open plaza defined by massive red structural arches and a distant purple neon sign. Finally, the environment opens up as the character approaches a futuristic gas station with a green and yellow canopy, passing parked vehicles and palm trees while continuing through the neon-lit downtown.
